# Portless URLs

<!-- GENERATED by `just portless-doc` from config/portless-aliases.yaml — do not edit by hand. -->

Local-dev HTTP UIs are reachable as stable `https://<name>.localhost` URLs through the portless
HTTPS proxy. Bring the proxy up with `just portless-up`, then start the backing stack
(`just tel-up` / `just emu-start` / `just emu-api`). Raw TCP wire protocols are not
portless-routable and are intentionally omitted (see `config/portless-aliases.yaml`).

| Service | Local port | Portless URL | Suggested env var |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| firebase | `127.0.0.1:4000` | `https://firebase.localhost` | `FIREBASE_URL` |
| neo4j | `127.0.0.1:7474` | `https://neo4j.localhost` | `NEO4J_URL` |
| a2a-inspector | `127.0.0.1:8081` | `https://a2a-inspector.localhost` | `A2A_INSPECTOR_URL` |
| mcp-inspector | `127.0.0.1:6274` | `https://mcp-inspector.localhost` | `MCP_INSPECTOR_URL` |
| mlflow | `127.0.0.1:5252` | `https://mlflow.localhost` | `MLFLOW_URL` |
| qdrant | `127.0.0.1:6333` | `https://qdrant.localhost` | `QDRANT_URL` |
| elasticsearch | `127.0.0.1:9200` | `https://elasticsearch.localhost` | `ELASTICSEARCH_URL` |
| grafana | `127.0.0.1:3010` | `https://grafana.localhost` | `GRAFANA_URL` |
| prometheus | `127.0.0.1:9091` | `https://prometheus.localhost` | `PROMETHEUS_URL` |
| tempo | `127.0.0.1:3200` | `https://tempo.localhost` | `TEMPO_URL` |
| loki | `127.0.0.1:3100` | `https://loki.localhost` | `LOKI_URL` |
| github | `127.0.0.1:4100` | `https://github.localhost` | `GITHUB_URL` |
| google | `127.0.0.1:4101` | `https://google.localhost` | `GOOGLE_URL` |
| slack | `127.0.0.1:4102` | `https://slack.localhost` | `SLACK_URL` |
| apple | `127.0.0.1:4103` | `https://apple.localhost` | `APPLE_URL` |
| microsoft | `127.0.0.1:4104` | `https://microsoft.localhost` | `MICROSOFT_URL` |
| stripe | `127.0.0.1:4105` | `https://stripe.localhost` | `STRIPE_URL` |
| clerk | `127.0.0.1:4106` | `https://clerk.localhost` | `CLERK_URL` |
| okta | `127.0.0.1:4107` | `https://okta.localhost` | `OKTA_URL` |
| resend | `127.0.0.1:4108` | `https://resend.localhost` | `RESEND_URL` |

## .env snippet

```dotenv
FIREBASE_URL=https://firebase.localhost
NEO4J_URL=https://neo4j.localhost
A2A_INSPECTOR_URL=https://a2a-inspector.localhost
MCP_INSPECTOR_URL=https://mcp-inspector.localhost
MLFLOW_URL=https://mlflow.localhost
QDRANT_URL=https://qdrant.localhost
ELASTICSEARCH_URL=https://elasticsearch.localhost
GRAFANA_URL=https://grafana.localhost
PROMETHEUS_URL=https://prometheus.localhost
TEMPO_URL=https://tempo.localhost
LOKI_URL=https://loki.localhost
GITHUB_URL=https://github.localhost
GOOGLE_URL=https://google.localhost
SLACK_URL=https://slack.localhost
APPLE_URL=https://apple.localhost
MICROSOFT_URL=https://microsoft.localhost
STRIPE_URL=https://stripe.localhost
CLERK_URL=https://clerk.localhost
OKTA_URL=https://okta.localhost
RESEND_URL=https://resend.localhost
```
